raw_observation: The example export is described as having several UV streams, but no stream has yet been demonstrated as the material-facing set.
candidate_causes: The exporter selected the wrong UV stream.
The original material combines more than one UV stream.
A missing per-material transform changes the stored UV coordinates.
discriminating_tests: Render an indexed grid through every preserved UV stream.
Search material metadata for stream selectors or scale and offset values.
confidence_basis: The record intentionally contains no executed extraction or render evidence.
